homepage.heroHeadline: Quality Fencing for San Antonio Homes
homepage.heroSubline: Horizon Fencing builds durable, beautiful fences designed for Texas weather. Serving the Hill Country since 2012 with locally-adapted materials and techniques.
aboutText: Founded in 2012 by a fourth-generation Texan, Horizon Fencing began with a simple mission: build fences that withstand San Antonio's extreme heat and sudden downpours while enhancing our clients' properties.
We use locally-sourced materials whenever possible, including limestone-friendly post-setting techniques that prevent the shifting and warping common in our clay-rich soils.
Every fence we build supports local jobs and reflects our commitment to preserving San Antonio's unique architectural character - from historic downtown properties to new Northside developments.

valueProps.title: Climate-Adapted
valueProps.description: Our fences are engineered for 100°+ summers and flash flood conditions common in Bexar County.

valueProps.title: Local Knowledge
valueProps.description: We understand soil types from downtown limestone to suburban clay beds.

valueProps.title: Community Focused
valueProps.description: 20% of our team are military veterans from nearby Randolph AFB communities.

valueProps.title: Honest Pricing
valueProps.description: No surprise charges - we provide detailed quotes accounting for San Antonio's unique terrain challenges.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Ready for a Fence That Lasts?
homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free estimate from our local fencing experts today.

services.name: Cedar Fencing
services.shortDescription: Natural cedar fences that resist San Antonio's humidity and insects.
services.description:
Our premium cedar fencing combines Hill Country aesthetics with practical durability. We source cedar from sustainable Texas forests, treating it with weather-resistant sealants that prevent warping in our 90% humidity summers.

Unlike cheaper pine alternatives, our cedar naturally repels termites common in San Antonio's older neighborhoods. We use thicker pickets (1x6 instead of standard 1x4) to withstand the occasional hail storm that rolls through the Hill Country.

Installation includes deep-setting posts in concrete with gravel drainage layers - crucial for preventing rot during our heavy spring rains. Perfect for historic districts where wood fences must meet preservation guidelines.
process: Step 1: Site evaluation checking for limestone bedrock and drainage patterns
Step 2: Custom design consultation matching your home's architectural style
Step 3: Premium cedar selection and pre-treatment
Step 4: Installation with military-grade hardware

faq.question: How does cedar hold up to San Antonio summers?
faq.answer: Our cedar is specially treated to resist UV damage and moisture absorption. The natural oils prevent cracking even during prolonged 100°+ heat waves.

faq.question: Can you match my historic home's existing fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we document original fence profiles in neighborhoods like King William and Monte Vista to recreate period-appropriate designs.

faq.question: Do I need special permits for a cedar fence?
faq.answer: Most San Antonio residential areas don't require permits for fences under 6 feet, but we handle all paperwork for historic districts and HOA approvals.

services.name: Wrought Iron Fencing
services.shortDescription: Custom ironwork combining security and San Antonio's Spanish colonial aesthetic.
services.description:
Hand-forged wrought iron fencing brings timeless elegance to San Antonio homes while providing security. Our local blacksmiths create custom designs inspired by the Alamo's iconic ironwork, using thick-gauge steel that won't rust in our humid climate.

We powder-coat every piece with a corrosion-resistant finish tested at Lackland AFB's material labs. The coating withstands UV rays that fade lesser products within two Texas summers.

Installation includes drilling into limestone bedrock when present (common in Alamo Heights and Olmos Park) using specialized masonry bits. Gate mechanisms are rated for 50,000+ cycles - important for busy families in suburbs like Stone Oak.

Popular for: Pool safety compliance, historic property preservation, and securing perimeter walls on hilltop properties.
process: Step 1: Security assessment and design consultation
Step 2: Hand-forging at our local workshop
Step 3: Anti-corrosion treatment process
Step 4: Professional installation with hidden fasteners

faq.question: How does iron hold up to San Antonio's humidity?
faq.answer: Our triple-layer powder coating prevents rust better than traditional paint. We warranty against corrosion for 20 years - even in flood-prone areas near the River Walk.

faq.question: Can you match my historic home's ironwork?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We've documented original Spanish colonial designs from missions throughout Bexar County and can recreate authentic patterns.

faq.question: Is wrought iron safe for pool areas?
faq.answer: Yes, our designs meet all CPSIA safety standards with properly spaced pickets that prevent child access while allowing clear visibility of the water.

services.name: Vinyl Fencing
services.shortDescription: Low-maintenance vinyl perfect for San Antonio's new developments.
services.description:
Our premium vinyl fencing offers a clean, modern look ideal for Northside's newer subdivisions. Unlike cheap big-box store products, we use commercial-grade vinyl with UV inhibitors that won't yellow or become brittle in Texas sun.

The thick, foam-filled posts resist cracking when temperatures swing 40 degrees in a day - a common occurrence from December to February. We install with stainless steel hardware that won't corrode from lawn sprinklers.

Perfect for: Busy families in communities like The Dominion who want privacy without maintenance. Excellent for containing pets in rocky backyard areas where wood fences struggle.

Available in multiple styles from classic picket to full privacy. All products carry a lifetime warranty against manufacturing defects - a promise we've honored for 12 years running.
process: Step 1: Measurement of your property's unique contours
Step 2: Color and style selection from premium options
Step 3: Custom fabrication at our Schertz workshop
Step 4: Installation with expansion joints for heat movement
benefits: Easy to clean with a hose

faq.question: How does vinyl handle San Antonio's extreme heat?
faq.answer: Our vinyl contains heat-stabilizing compounds that prevent sagging even during prolonged 100°+ weather. The material expands and contracts evenly without cracking.

faq.question: Can vinyl fences withstand high winds?
faq.answer: Yes, we reinforce every panel with aluminum channels in wind-prone areas like the hilltops around Boerne. Our installations have survived multiple derechos.

faq.question: Do you offer colors beyond white?
faq.answer: We stock six fade-resistant colors including tan and gray tones that complement San Antonio's native limestone and stucco homes.

services.name: Commercial Chain Link
services.shortDescription: Durable security fencing for businesses and large properties.
services.description:
Our commercial-grade chain link fencing provides affordable security for San Antonio businesses and large residential properties. We use thick 11-gauge steel with a zinc-aluminum coating that resists corrosion from our alkaline soil and occasional salty air when storms roll in from the Gulf.

Posts are set in concrete with anti-tamper footings - crucial for preventing vandalism in urban areas. All hardware is galvanized and meets ASTM specifications for commercial use.

Popular applications: Securing equipment yards on the East Side, perimeter fencing for schools, containing construction sites in fast-growing areas like the I-35 corridor. We can install barbed wire or privacy slats where needed.

Unlike temporary fencing companies, we build permanent installations designed to last decades in Texas weather. All work includes a 10-year warranty against rust and structural failure.
process: Step 1: Security needs assessment
Step 2: Custom engineering for your terrain
Step 3: Heavy-duty materials fabrication
Step 4: Professional installation with tensioned fabric

faq.question: How tall can you build chain link fences?
faq.answer: We regularly install 8-12 foot commercial fencing for industrial clients. Residential installations typically range from 4-6 feet depending on local ordinances.

faq.question: Can chain link withstand San Antonio's wind storms?
faq.answer: Yes, we use wind-rated fabric with reinforced top rails. Our installations at Joint Base San Antonio have withstood 70+ mph winds without failure.

faq.question: Do you offer colored vinyl coatings?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide green and black vinyl coatings that blend with landscapes while adding an extra layer of corrosion protection.

services.name: Pool Safety Fencing
services.description:
Code-compliant pool barriers that protect without sacrificing views of the Hill Country. Our pool fences meet all Texas Department of Health specifications with self-closing, self-latching gates positioned out of children's reach.

We offer several styles: Decorative aluminum that complements luxury pools in The Dominion, transparent mesh that preserves views in hilltop homes, and removable fencing for vacation rentals.

Every installation includes a free safety inspection and CPR instructions - our commitment to preventing drownings in a city with 300+ days of swim weather annually.

Materials are chosen specifically for pool chemical resistance. Stainless steel hardware won't corrode from chlorine splash, and powder-coated aluminum withstands constant sun exposure without fading.
services.shortDescription: Child-safe pool fencing meeting all Texas safety codes.
process: Step 1: Safety evaluation and code compliance check
Step 2: Barrier design consultation
Step 3: Materials selection for your pool environment
Step 4: Professional installation with safety testing

faq.question: What are San Antonio's pool fence requirements?
faq.answer: Barriers must be at least 48" tall with gaps no wider than 4". Gates must open outward and have self-closing mechanisms with latches 54" above ground.

faq.question: Can pool fencing be removable?
faq.answer: Yes, we install temporary mesh fencing systems popular with vacation rental owners. These meet code when properly tensioned and can be taken down during adult-only gatherings.

faq.question: How close can fencing be to the pool edge?
faq.answer: We recommend at least 36" clearance to prevent children from climbing over from poolside furniture. The exact distance depends on your deck layout.

reviews.name: María G.
reviews.text: Horizon replaced our rotting pine fence in Monte Vista with beautiful cedar that matches our 1920s home. They discovered limestone just inches below our soil and used special equipment to set the posts properly. Two summers later, not one picket has warped despite the humidity.

reviews.name: James T.
reviews.text: The custom iron gate they built for our Olmos Park estate is stunning. They replicated a 19th century design we saw at Mission Concepción and the blacksmith even incorporated our family crest. After the May hailstorm, theirs was the only fence on our block without damage.

reviews.name: Linda and Robert W.
reviews.text: Our vinyl fence in Stone Oak looks brand new after 5 Texas summers. The install crew worked around our rocky backyard terrain without complaint. When a delivery truck clipped one section last year, they had it repaired within 48 hours - no questions asked.

reviews.name: David P.
reviews.text: As a property manager, I've used Horizon for fencing at six different apartment complexes. Their commercial chain link withstands tenant abuse and weather alike. They recently completed a 1,200-foot perimeter fence at our Leon Valley property ahead of schedule despite heavy rains.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: The removable mesh fence they installed around our Boerne vacation rental gives us peace of mind. It's sturdy enough to stop toddlers but disappears in photos. Their safety inspector caught several code issues our previous installer had missed.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: Impressed with how they handled our sloping lot in Terrell Hills. The stepped iron fence follows the natural grade perfectly, with no awkward gaps. The powder coating has held up beautifully despite being sprayed by sprinklers daily.

service-areas.title: San Antonio Area Fencing Services
service-areas.description: We serve communities throughout the Hill Country with locally-adapted fencing solutions.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Fencing proudly serves homeowners in New Braunfels, TX, where the scenic Hill Country landscape inspires beautiful stone homes and rustic designs. Our fencing solutions are tailored to complement the natural aesthetics of the area while providing durability against the hot Texas summers. Whether you need a sturdy wood fence, elegant wrought iron, or low-maintenance vinyl, we ensure your property stands out in this growing community. With New Braunfels' rapid expansion, enhancing curb appeal and security with a quality fence has never been more important. Let us help you create a functional and stylish boundary for your home or business.
serviceAreas.localContext: New Braunfels is known for its Hill Country charm, historic stone homes, and proximity to the Guadalupe River.

serviceAreas.content: In Boerne, TX, Horizon Fencing specializes in crafting custom fences that match the unique character of Hill Country homes. Many properties here feature upscale designs, and our team ensures your fence enhances both privacy and visual appeal. From classic wood ranch-style fencing to modern metal designs, we work with you to find the perfect fit. The hot summers demand materials that withstand the heat, and our durable options are built to last. Trust us to deliver exceptional craftsmanship for your Boerne residence.
serviceAreas.localContext: Boerne is a charming Hill Country town with a mix of historic architecture and luxury custom homes.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Fencing is a trusted provider for Schertz, TX, where military families and residents near Randolph AFB seek reliable fencing solutions. We understand the need for security and privacy in this tight-knit community. Our team offers a variety of fencing styles, from sturdy chain-link for practicality to decorative aluminum for enhanced curb appeal. Schertz's hot summers require durable materials, and our fences are designed to endure the Texas climate with minimal upkeep. Let us help you secure your property with a fence that meets your needs.
serviceAreas.localContext: Schertz is a family-friendly city with strong ties to Randolph Air Force Base and a growing residential community.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Fencing serves San Marcos, TX, a vibrant college town with a mix of historic homes and modern developments. Whether you're a homeowner near Texas State University or a business along the I-35 corridor, we provide fencing solutions that balance aesthetics and functionality. The hot summers here call for weather-resistant materials, and our vinyl, metal, and wood options are built to last. From privacy fences to decorative accents, we help you define your space with style.
serviceAreas.localContext: San Marcos is home to Texas State University and features a blend of historic charm and youthful energy.

serviceAreas.content: In Cibolo, TX, Horizon Fencing helps homeowners and businesses create secure, attractive boundaries with high-quality fencing. Let us enhance your property with a fence that suits your lifestyle.
